match.userMessage:
Natural cinematic realism in modern social-first beauty photography style, SCARLETT wearing casual light-colored top with high-waisted linen shorts leans toward the small round mirror on a white vanity table, body angled forward with one hand holding the lipstick from (CORAL_LIPSTICK) and the other steadying near her chin in the opening moment before applying a precise stroke across her lower lip, intimate vanity room featuring crisp white surfaces and minimal furnishings, bright directional morning sunlight cutting sharply across the tabletop and walls to cast clean highlights with soft natural shadows, captured on a 35mm lens at a slightly elevated close-up angle with shallow depth of field keeping the foreground action crisp while the background softly falls away into gentle bokeh.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: Scarlett - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: INT. VANITY ROOM - MORNING - Small intimate vanity space with a white tabletop vanity table and a small round mirror
    - Image 3 [ELEMENT REF]: CORAL_LIPSTICK - Slim elegant lipstick tube with smooth cylindrical metallic casing in soft coral-pink finish
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
